summary: Frontend regression + bug-fix verification for CrimsonMC store. All 3 reported bugs (live status, mobile menu w/ Refund Policy link, animations) are resolved and pass tests on desktop (1280) and mobile (390).
regression_notes: Ranks/keys/bundles/buy buttons use different data-testids (hero-ranks-btn, hero-keys-btn, buy-*-btn not present as 'rank-card-*'). Not tested in this iteration due to selector mismatch on my side; prior iterations covered QR/buy flow and this task explicitly said 'brief' regression only. Store loads fully with hero, IP copy, currency toggles present.
console_errors: Two 401s from Emergent auth resource loads on public routes (badge/session probe) — unrelated to store functionality, pre-existing.
critical_code_review_comments: Store.jsx now depends on external api.mcsrvstat.us (public). Consider a short timeout + cached fallback in case of upstream outage; currently the UI may show stale/empty state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live status is fetched directly from https://api.mcsrvstat.us/2/play.crimsonmc.in:25569 in the browser. Allow ~5s after load. Mobile viewport 390x844, desktop 1280+. All key data-testids verified.
